reasoning: SPY at 690.15 is sandwiched between yesterday's RTH low (681.14 Active, $9.01 below) and yesterday's RTH high (692.29 Active, $2.14 above). Ribbon is in BULL configuration (fast 690.37 > pivot 690.15 > slow 689.09, 129¢ spread). The battle level is 692.29 — the first overhead resistance. If price tests and holds 692.29, it confirms intraday resistance and may retrace toward 689–688 support. If it breaks 692.29, the next target is 696.95 (5-day Carry tier resistance, $6.80 above). Risk/reward favors bulls if ribbon remains intact (i.e., price stays above slow EMA 689.09); any break below 688 inverts the bias to neutral/bearish. Small overnight gap (-0.57) and falling VIX support a higher-probability test of 692.29.

primary.condition: if SPY tests and holds 692.29 on first approach

secondary.entry_trigger: breakout above yesterday's high + carry resistance breach

tertiary.condition: if SPY fails to reach 692.29 and retreats below 688.0

key_observations: Price is $2.14 below yesterday's high (692.29) — immediate friction point if bulls want to extend.
BULL ribbon with 129-cent spread suggests intraday bias is positive; watch for ribbon inversion below 689.09 (slow EMA) as capitulation signal.
5-day Carry resistance (696.95) sits $6.80 above and is the secondary target if 692.29 breaks; no confluence until then.
Overnight gap was minimal (-0.57) and VIX is falling — low-friction environment for upside probe of 692.29.
